# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_version: "1.1"

services:
  - name: users-service
    url: http://users:3000
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        paths:
          - /users
        strip_path: true

  - name: orders-service
    url: http://orders:3000
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        strip_path: true

  - name: products-service
    url: http://products:3000
    routes:
      - name: products-route
        paths:
          - /products
        strip_path: true

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    targets:
      - target: users:3000
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    targets:
      - target: orders:3000
        weight: 100

  - name: products-upstream
    targets:
      - target: products:3000
        weight: 100

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    service: users-service
    config:
      second: 5
      minute: 100

  - name: request-size-limiting
    service: orders-service
    config:
      limit: 128000

  - name: cors
    service: products-service
    config:
      origins: 
        - "*"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      headers:
        - "Content-Type"
        - "Authorization"
      allow_credentials: true
